name: 3V DC Motor with Fan
description: Small brushed DC motor with attached fan blade. Runs at approximately 3V and draws 300mA. The motor is a vertical cylinder with a flat fan disc mounted at the top. Non-polarized: applying V+ to Lead 1 and GND to Lead 2 spins clockwise (blows air down); reversing polarity spins counter-clockwise (pulls air up).

pins.label: Lead 1
pins.description: Motor lead. V+ here and GND on Lead 2 → clockwise (air up). Reverse for counter-clockwise.

pins.label: Lead 2
pins.description: Motor lead. V+ here and GND on Lead 1 → counter-clockwise (air down). Reverse for clockwise.

features.label: fan cutout
features.description: Clearance disc for fan blades extending from the top of the motor shaft.
